titleStmt.title: SII 10.290: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 290. (A.R. No. 558 of 1925.) ON A PILLAR IN THE OUTER MAṆḌAPA OF THE TEMPLE OF RĀMALINGĒŚVARA, VĒLPŪRU, SATTENEPALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1161. (Vikāri)

summary.p: States that a certain Aita-Sāni a dependent of Kākati Gaṇapatidēva gave 25 cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Rāmēśvara of Vēlpunūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta praśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāma
ṁḍalēśvara kōṭagōkarājula bhōgastrī yaina komma
sāni koḍku gōkināIniki yaitasāniki suputru laina
Anaṁtināyuṁḍunu nāgināyuṁḍunu Ānāgi
nāIniki brammasāniki suputri kuladīpakuṟā lai
na yaitasāniyu Āyama vallabhuṁ ḍaina sōmarau
tunu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara paramamahēśvara
kakatigaṇapatidēvamahārājula śrīpadapadmōpajī
vi yaina yaitasāni śakavarṣaṁbulu 1161 Agunēṁṭi
vikārisaṁvatsara bhādrapada śuddha 13 Ā . yaitasā
ni gaṇapatidēvamahārājulaku dharmmārtthamu
gā vēlpunūri śrīrāmēśvaramahādēvunikiniki
Ācaṁdrārkka makhaṁḍadīpavarttiki niccina mōdā
lu 25 vīniṁ jēkoni baddularāmanabōIni ko
ḍku muppanabōyuṁḍu tana putrānupautri
kamu nitya māneṁḍu neI vōyaṁgalavāṁḍu
Digital edition of SII 10.290 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
